raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1362 will ensure all foreign labor recruiters register with the Labor Commissioner to aid in the prevention of human trafficking.",
    "The vast majority of temporary foreign workers have remained unprotected and subject to documented abuses by foreign labor recruiters.",
    "AB 1362 aims to close a loophole to protect all temporary immigrant workers from wage theft, human trafficking, and other labor violations.",
    "California has an obligation to implement uniform worker protections for the 350,000 temporary immigrant workers entering the state annually.",
    "Fraudulent recruitment practices are a key driver of forced labor, leaving migrant workers vulnerable to debt bondage and abuse.",
    "AB 1362 will create clear definitions of human trafficking and forced labor.",
    "AB 1362 will provide guidance on contract language to prevent exploitation and human trafficking.",
    "AB 1362 will mandate safe living conditions for workers when provided by employers.",
    "AB 1362 will outline procedures for companies to follow if they identify instances of trafficking or forced labor.",
    "Labor trafficking is often treated as less dangerous and less severe than it actually is, according to expert observations."
  ]
}
```
